investigation_summary: Active multi-billion IRS transfer-pricing dispute (Tax Court 2023 loss on facts; appeal noted in SEC). Routinely #1–2 plastic polluter Brand Audit. Funded research minimizing sugar-obesity link (NYT 2015). India Kerala groundwater controversy. Historical Colombia bottler violence suits — jurisdictional dismissals in U.S.; underlying violence documented.

profile.tax_summary: IRS alleges ~$9B+ underpayment 2007–2009 re IP charged to offshore affiliates; Tax Court 2023 decision adverse to Coca-Cola; appeal + penalties could exceed $12B. Effective rate volatile with reserves.
profile.legal_summary: IRS case above. Plachimada India plant — state closure order, Supreme Court reversal, unpaid parliamentary compensation demand (historical). Guatemala franchise violence 1970s–80s — boycott history. 2024 press on distributor algorithmic pricing investigations involving PepsiCo.
profile.labor_summary: Sugar supply chains — Brazil/Colombia labor risk literature. Colombia paramilitary murders of unionists — bottler not parent; ATS dismissal 2001 suit on jurisdiction.
profile.environmental_summary: Top plastic polluter audits. 2025 100% recyclability goal unmet. Dasani tap-water sourcing critiques. CDP A- operational climate.
profile.political_summary: ~$9.2M lobbying (2023) — sugar-tax opposition; trade/FDA. Research grants framing sugar debate.
profile.product_health: 39g sugar / 12oz — most of WHO daily limit. Diet formulations — aspartame IARC 2B 2023. Epidemiological obesity/diabetes links.
profile.executive_summary: Long-tenured management; no individual criminal findings in this brief.
